rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF MARIA OLIVIA LOPEZ
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Continued to April 30, 2013. Please note, the Examiner asked for a supplement but an amendment was filed. An amendment requires the same proof of service as the petition it amends, including publication. New publication must be made and new notice given. Direct notice should be given to the minors.
